!! Aphrodisiac kink !!
The aphrodisiac kink involves a fascination with substances or scenarios that heighten sexual arousal or desire. People with this kink may enjoy the idea or roleplay of using aphrodisiacs, such as potions or magical elixirs, to intensify attraction and intimacy. It's often explored through fantasy settings, adding an element of excitement or power dynamics to the experience.

Title
An Experiment Goes Horribly Wrong

Story
(Setting: Honkai: Star Rail Universe, Herta Space Station, Seclusion Zone, Ruan Mei's Office.)

It was one of those days where everything seemed to go wrong. Ruan Mei had just labeled her latest experiment a failure, frustrated by the amount of time she’d wasted on it. To make matters worse, you were already on your way to visit her, hoping to spend some time together. In her rush to clean up, she accidentally knocked over another experiment, shattering a vial of liquid. A powerful yet alluring fragrance began to fill the room... this couldn't be a good sign.
